name: Veggie Burger
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup fresh corn kernels or frozen, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Stir in corn, mushrooms, scallions, and bell pepper. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
3. Add garlic, cumin, and cayenne. Cook for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Remove from heat and stir in spinach. Add carrot and potato. Stir to combine.
5. Add egg white and season with salt and pepper.
6. Mix in enough bread crumbs so that the mixture holds together.
7. Shape the mixture into 6 disks and place on a plate. Chill for 1 hour.
8. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a non-stick skillet. Cook veggie burgers until golden brown on each side.
9. In a small bowl, mix yogurt and mint.
Serve with 2-3 servings.
